Package org.eventb.core.pog

Interface IPOGProcessorModule

All Superinterfaces:
IModule, IProcessorModule
All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseModule, CommitHypothesesModule, ContextAxiomModule, ContextCommitHypothesesModule, ContextHypothesesModule, ContextModule, FwdMachineCommitHypothesesModule, FwdMachineEventActionBodySimModule, FwdMachineEventActionFrameSimModule, FwdMachineEventActionModule, FwdMachineEventCommitHypothesesModule, FwdMachineEventGuardModule, FwdMachineEventHypothesesModule, FwdMachineEventModule, FwdMachineEventStrengthenGuardModule, FwdMachineEventVariantModule, FwdMachineEventWitnessModule, FwdMachineHypothesesModule, FwdMachineInvariantModule, FwdMachineNewEventInvariantModule, FwdMachineRefEventInvariantModule, FwdMachineRefinementModule, FwdMachineVariantModule, GlobalHypothesesModule, MachineEventActionUtilityModule, MachineEventInvariantModule, MachineEventRefinementModule, MachineModule, POGProcessorModule, PredicateModule, UtilityModule
public interface IPOGProcessorModule extends IProcessorModule
The processor modules of the proof obligation generator generate the proof obligations. The use of the methods initModule(), process(), and endModule() are described in IModule.

The state and the state repository must be of types IPOGState and IPOGStateRepository to avoid accidental mixing of static checker and proof obligation generator state.

Since:
3.0
See Also:
  • IModule
  • IProcessorModule
  • IPOGState
  • IPOGStateRepository

    • initModule

      void initModule(IRodinElement element, IPOGStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Initialisation code for the module
      Parameters:
      element - statically checked element
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem initialising this module

    • process

      Parameters:
      element - statically checked element
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem running this module

    • endModule

      void endModule(IRodinElement element, IPOGStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Termination code for the module
      Parameters:
      element - statically checked element
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem terminating this module
